verbatim_text: So now let's look at what is the performance of open source models on this particular task. So here the x-axis is the model size of this open source model. The y-axis is the performance on this proof based benchmark. And what you see here is first that the larger models like 600B plus models, DeepSeq, Math, V2 and Gemini 3, they're much better than this 4B model that we're starting with on the left. But the other thing that you notice that scaling model size is not going to be the solution here because there is also a performance plateau as we scale the model size on this particular task.
